code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
while i <= n
  mut b = -1
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = -1
    end
  end
  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
  let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43
  if is_digit
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    end
    value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if is_sign and not in_num
    in_num = true
    value = 0
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else
      sign = 1
    end
  else
    if in_num
      let total = value * sign
      if total > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("positive=#{count}")
